sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33373" key="e)laiofilofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιο-φῐλοφάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n33373.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of eating olives</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κιχῆλαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">157</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
